expectations.text: Acknowledges it will read the data-cleaner skill before running (or notes it needs access to it)
expectations.evidence: FIXED in v1.0.1: Workflow B Step 1 now reads 'If the user has not provided a path to the target skill's SKILL.md, ask for it before proceeding.' The agent will ask for the path rather than attempting to proceed without it.

expectations.text: Simulates executing the eval prompt following the skill's instructions
expectations.evidence: Workflow B Step 2: 'Follow the skill's instructions to complete the prompt' and 'Keep a structured trace of steps taken.'

expectations.text: Grades each of the three expectations individually with PASS/FAIL and cited evidence
expectations.evidence: Workflow B Step 3: 'For each expectation: Cite specific evidence from your trace. Mark PASS or FAIL — no partial credit.'

expectations.text: Produces a summary with overall pass rate
expectations.evidence: Workflow B Step 4: 'Produce a summary including per-eval pass rates, overall pass rate...'

expectations.text: Flags the inline grading caveat (self-grading bias) and suggests Claude Code for final validation
expectations.evidence: Workflow B Step 4 ends with explicit caveat: 'Treat inline results as a fast-iteration signal, not a definitive verdict. Claude Code subagent runs are more rigorous for final sign-off.'

expectations.text: Does NOT just describe what the skill would do — actually traces through the execution
expectations.evidence: Workflow B Step 2 says 'Keep a structured trace of steps taken' and Step 3 says 'Cite specific evidence from your trace.'

note: Was 5/6 at v1.0.0. Bug found during inline grading and fixed before finalising.
